description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with a mix of flat and slightly elevated roof sections, large glass windows, and a combination of wood and concrete exterior finishes. The structure is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, lush landscaping with palm trees, and a small garden area. There is an outdoor deck with seating and a hot tub, as well as a covered gazebo adjacent to the main building. The interior is partially visible, revealing open-plan living spaces with contemporary furnishings and bright accent colors. The building has two above-ground stories, with the upper level set back and finished in wood paneling. Multiple large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces seamlessly.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large glass windows, wood and concrete finishes, surrounded by landscaped gardens, a gazebo, and an outdoor deck with a hot tub.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance, large glass windows, and the gazebo with palm trees on the left side.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the open deck area with a hot tub, outdoor seating, and the back garden with palm trees.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the wood-paneled upper story, extensive windows, and the landscaped garden with a winding path.
description_view_3: The opposite side reveals more of the garden, palm trees, and the setback upper story with a clear view of the yellow-accented interior.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
